onnxr 0.1.1
  • Reference
    • End-to-end example
  • Changelog

Package index

Load and run a model

onnx_model()
Load an ONNX model
onnx_run()
Run or predict from an ONNX model

Manage the ONNX runtime

onnx_install()
Install ONNX Runtime
onnx_find_lib()
Find the ONNX Runtime shared library
onnx_is_installed()
Check whether ONNX Runtime is available
onnx_is_loaded
Check whether ONNX Runtime is loaded

On this page
